# PHIL.003 ? Stoicism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** stoicism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Virtue as sole good; acceptance of what cannot be controlled; reason as guide; living according to nature; equanimity in face of fortune

## Application
Focus on what is within control; accept external circumstances calmly; prioritize virtue over outcomes; maintain rational perspective on emotions

## Key Values
- Self-control
- Rational acceptance
- Virtue ethics
- Emotional resilience

## Tags
philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, stoicism
